text: Related bootstrap/install work: see also T-41 (fresh host-project bootstrap trial) and T-35 (bootstrap stub concept). T-81 is the concrete UX-focused umbrella for a smoother single-command setup path.

T-66 (just closed) delivered the setup script. Current flow is already 2 commands: 'gittoc init && ./tools/gittoc/setup'. Clarify: is T-81 about reducing further, or about something T-66 didn't cover? If the latter, update the body. If the former, consider closing as resolved by T-66.
